reviews.author: James K.
reviews.text: Perfect location, walking distance to the beach and all the action. Maria was incredibly responsive. The studio is exactly as shown — clean, modern, and well-equipped. Will definitely be back.

reviews.author: Sophie D.
reviews.text: Amazing host! The apartment is right in the heart of South Beach. The pool is beautiful. Check-in was seamless — digital lock, no issues at all. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Carlos M.
reviews.text: Great place overall. A bit noisy at night from the street but expected in South Beach. Everything else was top notch — very clean, fast wifi, comfortable bed.

reviews.author: Priya N.
reviews.text: We stayed here for Christmas and it was perfect. Maria left a welcome bottle of wine. The kitchen has everything you need. 10 minute walk to the beach.
